about.heading: About Sandur Productions
about.description: Sandur Productions is an independent student-led production house founded by Amogha Raj Sandur. We craft cinematic stories that move, inspire, and provoke thought — from gripping web series to compelling short films.
about.missionText: To tell stories that matter. We believe in the power of cinema to illuminate truth, challenge perspectives, and create lasting emotional impact.
about.contactDescription: Interested in collaborating or have a project in mind? Reach out to us.

contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.description: Interested in collaborating or have a project in mind? Reach out to us.

cookie.bannerText: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, serve personalized ads or content, and analyze our traffic. By clicking "Accept All", you consent to our use of cookies.
cookie.preferencesDesc: Review and manage your privacy settings below. You can change your preferences at any time.
cookie.strictDesc: These cookies are essential for the website to function properly. They cannot be disabled.
cookie.analyticsDesc: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with the website by collecting and reporting information anonymously (e.g., Google Analytics, Clarity).
cookie.marketingDesc: These cookies are used to track visitors across websites to allow publishers to display relevant advertisements.
cookie.learnMore: Learn more in our Cookie Policy
